code_gate.evidence: bridge_trained.py implemented and tested; e4_cli supports trained_bridge arm; docker image built with PWM; config updated with correct lens path (outputs/l10/lens_qwen3_mid30.pt). All pre-dispatch tasks complete.

domain_gate.evidence: Screen-tier GPU dispatch blocked: Docker container (prabodha/gb10:0.1, aarch64/arm64) binary incompatibility. `/usr/bin/python3: cannot execute binary file` error when running e4_cli inside container. This is an infrastructure-level blocker at the container execution layer, not an algorithmic issue.

diagnosis.error: python3 binary execution failed in Docker container (aarch64 base image incompatibility with host environment)
diagnosis.impact: Cannot execute GPU workload; e4_cli cannot initialize inside container
diagnosis.recommendation: Investigate Docker container binary format (aarch64 vs host arch mismatch) or use alternative execution environment (direct host python or compatible container image)

deviations: Container binary incompatibility prevented GPU dispatch (./usr/bin/python3 cannot execute binary file)
Pre-dispatch infrastructure validation did not catch container execution issue until actual dispatch attempt
